title: My Hearts Belong to You
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name="My Hearts Belong to You" |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer=*[[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]]{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} *[[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]]{{CSWECite|II|347|"My Heart Belongs to You"}} |publisher= |release date= |media type=[[Music/Legends|Song]] |pages= |published in= |genre= }} "'''My Hearts Belong to You'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] performed by [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]], a [[Band/Legends|band]] formed in the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' At some point before [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], the band's lead [[Musician/Legends|musician]], was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," including the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. his band made three recordings and a name for themselves with crowd-pleasers such as "My Hearts Belong to You." After Orbus's death, the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] was formed from the remaining band members, and "My Hearts Belong to You" remained popular with the new band. ==Behind the scenes== "My Hearts Belong to You" was introduced in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' later referred to the song as "My Heart Belongs to You." This article assumes the "My Hearts Belong to You" name from "Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band" is the correct song title. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|"My Heart Belongs to You"}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=My Heart Belongs to You }} [[Category:Songs by Evar Orbus and His Galactic Wailers]] [[Category:Songs by the Max Rebo Band]]
